# doc-image-audit-exclusions.txt
#
# Images referenced in docs/ that are intentionally hand-crafted and
# are NOT auto-generated by a doc_image/doc_animation scenario.
#
# Add one repo-relative path per line.  Lines starting with # and blank
# lines are ignored.  Run `make ha-tests-doc-audit` (or
# `pytest ha-tests/test_doc_audit.py`) to verify that all doc images are
# either covered by a scenario or listed here.
